task_completion.description: Verify the recipient and subject of the first email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an email composition window or a message preview showing the 'To' field as 'financial-media@example.com' and the 'Subject' as 'EMBARGOED: Q4 Financial Results and Merger Announcement'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct attachment is included in the first email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'exhibit_99_1_press_release.pdf' in the attachment pane of the composition window or the message preview for Email 1.

task_completion.description: Verify the recipient and subject of the second email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an email composition window or a message preview showing the 'To' field as 'board-of-directors@example.com' and the 'Subject' as 'Internal: Form 8-K Filing for Review'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct attachment is included in the second email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'form_8k_current_report.pdf' in the attachment pane of the composition window or the message preview for Email 2.

task_completion.description: Verify both emails are queued for later delivery in the 'Unsent Messages' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Thunderbird folder pane on the left. The 'Unsent Messages' (or Outbox) folder under 'Local Folders' should be selected or show a message count of at least 2. The main pane should list both embargoed emails, confirming they were queued via 'Send Later' and not sent immediately.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Thunderbird graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Mozilla Thunderbird application window being actively used to compose and queue the emails, rather than terminal commands or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the emails were not just saved as drafts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the 'Drafts' folder is not the final location of these emails. They must specifically be in 'Unsent Messages' to be queued for delivery.

integrity.description: Verify the attachments are actual files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The attachments should appear in the dedicated attachment area of the Thunderbird UI (showing file icons and sizes), not just as text typed into the email body.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Email 1 must be addressed to 'financial-media@example.com' with subject 'EMBARGOED: Q4 Financial Results and Merger Announcement' and attachment 'exhibit_99_1_press_release.pdf'. Email 2 must be addressed to 'board-of-directors@example.com' with subject 'Internal: Form 8-K Filing for Review' and attachment 'form_8k_current_report.pdf'.
